title: Regioselective mononitration of coumarins using claycop reagent
author: Saraswati Kanodia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Delhi, Delhi-110 007, India 
Organic Building Materials Division, Central Building Research Institute, Roorkee-247 667, Uttaranchal, India 
 E-mail  : pct866@yahoo.com 
 Manuscript received 16 November 2009, revised 04 May 2010, accepted 14 June 2010  

 Coumarins arc nitrated by claycop (cupric nitrate Impregnated on the K1O montmorillonite) in acetic anhldride at room temperature to give corresponding regloselective mononitro coumarins in good to excellent yields. Among the products three nitrocoumarins are new.

 Coumarins arc nitrated by claycop (cupric nitrate Impregnated on the K1O montmorillonite) in acetic anhldride at room temperature to give corresponding regloselective mononitro coumarins in good to excellent yields. Among the products three nitrocoumarins are new.
